title: Evangelion 20 Complete Records Collection
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.0 Complete Records Collection             Quote Post by kabezonalex16 » Sun Jun 27, 2010 10:53 am Alguien tiene noticias acerca de este nuevo libro?? Además, alguien tiene a disposición el Complete Records Collection de 1.01? Vivo en Chile y difícilmente podría comprarlo desde aquí POR FAVOR!! ALGUIEN TIENE EL EVANGELION COMPLETE RECORDS COLLECTION 1.01????

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Jun 27, 2010 11:03 am http://translate.google.com/translate?js=y&prev=_t&hl=hu&ie=UTF-8&layout=1&eotf=1&u=http://www.evageeks.org/2010/06/evangelion-complete-2-0/&sl=en&tl=es

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Mon Jun 28, 2010 7:28 pm I just have to ask, does this set contain the film strip extra regardless of whether you pre-order or not? I really do want this book set to go with my Eva 1.0 complete works set. The film strip will be icing on the cake for me. Can anyone here answer the question for me?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jun 28, 2010 7:37 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: I just have to ask, does this set contain the film strip extra regardless of whether you pre-order or not? I really do want this book set to go with my Eva 1.0 complete works set. The film strip will be icing on the cake for me. Can anyone here answer the question for me?

[]:             Quote Post by berto » Tue Jun 29, 2010 5:41 am Que ¿Quieres comprarlo o quieres scans? Porque scans casi no hay, y para comprarlo es casi imposible de encontrar. Esto es lo mejpr que puedo aser por ti: http://cgi.ebay.com/Evangelion-1-0-You- ... 2a0249c7df http://cgi.ebay.com/Evangelion-1-0-You- ... 53e1a5b4f3 Pregunta si te lo mandan a Chile.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 02, 2010 8:10 pm kabezonalex16 : There are probably scans on 4chan or somewhere else on online. Probablemente hay scans en 4chan o en otro lugar en línea. Of course, you can probably directly buy either book (1.0 or 2.0) from Kinokuniya or Hobbylink Japan and by being patient. Por supuesto, es probable que pueda compras directamente uno u otro libro (1.0 o 2.0) o Japón de Kinokuniya Hobbylink y siendo paciente. Hobbylink: http://www.hlj.com/ Kinokuniya: http://www.kinokuniya.com/

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Aug 04, 2010 11:04 am Le bump. The 2.0 Complete Records Book can be pre-ordered from Amazon. If rumors are true, this will contain an interview with Anno himself. I sure hope someone will scan it and then someone will translate it.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Aug 04, 2010 12:52 pm I doubt that will happen. We have around five or six untranslated Anno interviews available going back to 1997. Everyone just hates translating them because of the difficulty involved.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Aug 04, 2010 4:22 pm SaltyJoe wrote: Le bump. The 2.0 Complete Records Book can be pre-ordered from Amazon.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Thu Aug 05, 2010 7:09 pm yeah right.....i would buy if the import didnt cost me more then the books itsself !

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Sep 05, 2010 7:15 pm Well, amazon lists it as in-stock right now as it promised for a while it to be due out on the 6th. On the other hand HLJ has it as arriving on the 20th of september :\ I really hope that's just an automatic status update on amazon and it's delayed everywhere and not just HLJ.

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Sun Sep 05, 2010 9:13 pm It goes on sale on the Eva store on the 6th as well so that's the release date.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Sep 06, 2010 12:36 am But is there any confirmation that it's actually out? I'd really love to know as soon as possible because if it's delayed on HLJ and amazon already has it and willing to ship internationally I'll switch. In the order form amazon is claiming only 3,000 yen shipping which is a complete steal (even if you factor in the obligatory FedEx fees rape at the border later).

[]:             Quote Post by soundwaveCA » Tue Sep 07, 2010 9:52 am Yes this is out, happen to be visiting Japan right now and only saw it at the Kotobukiya store in Akihabera. Pretty cool pack but overpriced IMO, though I'm sure it would be a better value if you could read the text :( Got a second filmstrip though to add to the collection and a free tote bag :) (first filmstrip I got from the blu-Ray of 2.22) Set is 4 books total, 2 books of the complete storyboards, 1 of concept art/sketches and interviews, and of of more or less screencaps of the whole film. Book to get right now IMO is the Yoshiyuki Sadamoto Carmine artbook, pretty awesome stuff especially if you like his other works besides Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by SpearofLonginus » Tue Sep 07, 2010 12:41 pm I wish I could find an Asuka filmstrip for my gf that wasn't $100+ >>; I hate supply/demand lol

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Sep 07, 2010 6:10 pm ended up switching to amazon and they promptly shipped it. FedEx says I'll have it tomorrow but they're probably lying.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Sep 08, 2010 12:00 am I got mine from AmiAmi. Will probably get it sometime next week. Does anyone here aside from me own the Eva 1.0 Complete Records before ordering this? I got mine a few months back from some guy that worked for Viz comics. LOL. Pretty good steal at the time too since i only had to pay 150 bucks shipping included....

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Sep 08, 2010 12:19 am Electric Sachiel wrote: Does anyone here aside from me own the Eva 1.0 Complete Records before ordering this?

[]:             Quote Post by Riotgear » Wed Sep 08, 2010 4:46 am Electric Sachiel wrote: I got mine from AmiAmi. Will probably get it sometime next week. Does anyone here aside from me own the Eva 1.0 Complete Records before ordering this?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Sep 08, 2010 12:01 pm I was amazed that the FedEx man didn't lie. I actually did get it on September 8th before noon. I went through the archives book and it is glorious. Gonna go through the storyboard in the evening after class. Spammed a few photos on /m/ for fun if people want a preview of the book.
